summary: Phase 78 — Weekly AI Briefing fully verified. Backend pytest: 21/21 PASS. AuthZ: anon→401, client→403, admin→200 on /config, /history, /send-now. PUT /config persists enabled+recipients (verified via GET round-trip); invalid emails (no @ or no .) silently filtered server-side (good@x.com,ok2@a.b kept; no-at-sign/no-dot@nope dropped); non-list recipients → 400. POST /send-now: empty config returns {skipped:'no_recipients'}; with body override sends and returns ok=true, forced=true, sent_at, subject, summary_text (non-empty Romanian LLM result), recipients echoed; all required stats keys present (events_count, by_kind, auto_match_assigned, findings_resolved/detected, smoke_pass/fail, autonomy.current.general/week_ago.general/current_tier). config.last_sent_at populated after success. POST /send-now with empty body uses configured recipients. POST /send-now with non-list recipients in body → 400. GET /history?limit=N returns {items,count} sorted desc by sent_at, each with required fields (sent_at, recipients, subject, ok, summary_text, stats), no _id leak; client gets 403. Scheduler entrypoint run_weekly_briefing_job() invoked directly: (a) enabled=false → {skipped:'disabled'}; (b) enabled=true + recipients → executes send_weekly_briefing, returns ok=true, forced=false, history collection grew by +1. Regression: /admin/ai-activity, /admin/autonomy/score, /admin/auto-match/preview, /admin/auto-match/schedule, /auth/login all 200. Frontend /admin: WeeklyBriefingControl visible after AutoMatchPanel and before AIActivityStream; status badge correct ('Activ · luni 09:00' / 'Dezactivat'), recipients chip + × remove button, input + Adaugă add flow, send-now button auto-disables when no recipients, toggle flips status (verified flip + restore), Ultima trimitere row visible with cron tag and ✓ OK. No console errors related to briefing.
critical_code_review_comments: ai_weekly_briefing.py:307 — invalid-email filter only checks for '@' and '.' substrings: passes 'a@b.c' (good) but also passes pathological strings like '.@.' or 'foo@.com'. Consider switching to email-validator or a regex (e.g. ^[^@\s]+@[^@\s]+\.[^@\s]+$) before launching to many tenants.

ai_weekly_briefing.py:265-268 — history cap-at-50 uses `find().skip(50)` to find old docs to delete; but cursor sorts by sent_at desc, so this correctly drops the oldest. Code is right, but a TTL index on sent_at would be more idiomatic and resilient under concurrent inserts. Minor.

ai_weekly_briefing.py:295-313 — PUT /config persists `updated_at` and `updated_by` into Mongo but does NOT return them from _load_config(); they're write-only metadata. Either return them (handy in admin audit views) or store in a separate audit log. Cosmetic.

ai_weekly_briefing.py:317 — `payload.get('recipients') or None` collapses an explicit empty list to None, meaning a client posting {recipients: []} still uses configured recipients instead of getting {skipped:'no_recipients'}. Currently fine because UI doesn't do that, but worth a comment or stricter check (`override = payload['recipients'] if 'recipients' in payload else None`).

WeeklyBriefingControl.jsx — addRecipient/removeRecipient call PUT /config which returns the freshly-loaded config; component already uses that, but the optimistic update would feel snappier. Cosmetic.

WeeklyBriefingControl.jsx:8 — uses `axios.create({ baseURL: API })` at module scope. Acceptable, but other admin components share `axiosClient.js` with credentials + interceptors; align for consistency.

send_weekly_briefing returns the in-memory `history_doc` which carries the `_id` injected by insert_one — line 272 explicitly pops it, but pop is on a dict copy because insert_one mutates the original (motor behaviour). Verified by test (response JSON does not contain `_id`). OK.
Cron job runs at exactly Mon 09:00 Bucharest with misfire_grace_time=7200; if backend restarts within the 2h window it will catch up — desirable. Not a bug, just a note for operators.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (render, status badge, recipients add/remove, toggle flip+restore, send-now disabled state, last-sent display)

seed_data_creation: Test added one history entry via POST /send-now with override=['admin@propmanage.io'] and one via direct run_weekly_briefing_job invocation. Final config left as {enabled:true, recipients:['admin@propmanage.io']}. Real emails were sent to admin@propmanage.io as instructed by review request.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 78 weekly briefing is stable. Pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_phase78_weekly_briefing.py (21 tests, ~48s; the LLM-call paths each take ~10-15s). Endpoints under /api/admin/ai-weekly-briefing/{config,send-now,history}. UI at /admin Dashboard tab — widget data-testid='weekly-briefing-control' between AutoMatchPanel and AIActivityStream. Real Resend emails fire on each /send-now; reviewers should be aware that running tests sends real email. After tests, config persists last_sent_at and history has 50-row cap. Scheduler job 'weekly_ai_briefing' is registered with replace_existing=True at Mon 09:00 Europe/Bucharest with misfire_grace_time=7200.
